violations.text: The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Observed bags of ice stored on floor in freezer. PIC relocated bags of ice. FOOD shall be protected from contamination by storing the FOOD: (1) In a clean location; (2) Where it is not exposed to dust, or other contamination; and (3) At least 15 cm (6 inches) above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Observed corrosion around handwashing sink knobs and underneath faucet located in the (warewashing) area not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair/adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Observed the pre-flush spray hose at the (3-bay sink) hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was obstructed by a large container of coffee. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The gaskets on the door of a refrigeration unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

Milk was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the lowboy unit across from the front donut display. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All foods were moved to the walk-in. Unit was observed to be frozen over. Unit to be turned off and defrosted. Establishment to add visual check to units on top of usual temperature check. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Various chemicals were stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023
